description_long: This is a compact drip coffee machine with a rounded rectangular body, predominantly black with a gray accent band around the upper section. The front features a transparent glass carafe with a black handle, marked with measurement lines, sitting on a warming plate. A digital control panel with buttons and a small display is located at the base, just below the carafe. The right side displays a vertical water level indicator, while the back is smooth and unadorned except for the attached power cord. The top is flat and solid, likely concealing the water reservoir and filter compartment. The power cord is visibly coiled around the base, ending in a standard plug.
description: A modern black and gray drip coffee machine with a glass carafe, digital control panel, and visible power cord. It features a water level indicator and a flat top for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass carafe, digital control panel, and the start of the power cord.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the water level indicator and the full length of the power cord.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth back and the power cord extending outward.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the carafe and the power cord extending to the left.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small digital display flanked by several push buttons arranged horizontally at the base of the machine.
